title: Resource Browser (Design Layout)
text: Resource Browser (Design Layout) Insert objects from the component structure or code snippets from a selected snippet library into the layout. Tabs Structure —insert objects from the component structure as HTML elements or as binding information into the layout. The object name is added to the id attribute of the corresponding HTML element to bind the HTML to the data. For more information, see Binding Web Layout to Component Structure . Snippets —insert snippets of HTML code into the layout. Uniface provides a default snippet library called ULAYOUT which contains various HTML fragments for constructing and formatting a layout. For more information, see Snippets . How to Insert Uniface Objects in the Server Page Layout Shortcut Menu Table 1. Copy as HTML Menu Commands Command Description As Horizontal Table Formats all selected entities and their content as a horizontal table, with labels in the first row, and entity occurrence data in the second row. Inner entities are copied as tables within tables. As Unformatted HTML Formats the all selected objects as elements enclosed in <div> tags. As Binding Information Formats only the object type and name as an id or name attribute and its value. For example, id="ufld:BTN_STORE.ORDERS.SALES" Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
